name: Apple Cheddar Wontons
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples, cored and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apples and cut into small pieces.
2. Mix brown sugar and cinnamon together and set aside.
3. Preheat peanut or vegetable oil in a deep fryer or other pan used for deep frying.
4. Wrap a piece of apple and a cube of cheddar cheese in a wonton skin and seal according to package directions.
5. Deep fry until golden brown.
6. Coat with the brown sugar-cinnamon mixture and serve. This is good served hot or cold.
